components-header.name: Header

stories.name: Left Only
stories.snippet:
const LeftOnly = () => <Header
    left={(<Breadcrumb
      segments={[
        { label: 'Tasks', href: '/tasks' },
        { label: 'Calm Execution' },
      ]}
    />)}
    right={(<>
      <Button size="sm">
        <Icon name="add" size="sm" />
        New task
      </Button>
      <Avatar initial="AP" variant="profile" aria-label="Alejandra Paez" />
    </>)} />;

stories.name: Default
With Single Ref
With Multiple Refs
Completed
stories.snippet:
const Completed = () => <TaskRow
    title="Update API rate limiting configuration"
    completed
    checked
    priority="medium"
    refId="INFRA-441"
    badge={{ label: 'Done', variant: 'done' }}
    date={{ label: 'Mar 10', dateTime: '2026-03-10' }} />;

stories.name: With Task Id

stories.snippet:

    title="Address memory leak in production API cluster"
    refId="TSK-5"
    layout="compact"
    badge={{ label: 'In Progress', variant: 'progress' }}
    priority="critical"
    date={{ label: 'Today', dateTime: '2026-03-16', urgent: true }} />;
